All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

R

replacedTilePositions - Static variable in class view.GamePanel
 
resetCoolDown() - Static method in class model.Bomb
Resets the cooldown counter to maxBombCooldown
resetFirepower() - Static method in class view.Explosion
Resets the firepower, for example when the player move to another map or looses three lives
resetInvincibleCounter() - Method in class model.Character
Resets the counter to 0
resetKnockBackCounter() - Method in class model.Character
Resets the counter to 0
resetSpriteCounter() - Method in class view.BombView
Method to reset the sprite counter after a certain period of time is elapsed
resetSpriteCounter() - Method in class view.Explosion
Method to reset the sprite counter after a certain period of time is elapsed
resetSpriteNumber() - Method in class model.Character
Resets the sprite number to the default value (1)
resetSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.BombView
Resets the sprite number to 0
resetSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.Explosion
Resets the sprite number to 0
restart() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Restarts all the configuration of the game if, after a game over, the player decides to quit to title screen
retry() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Restarts just the level after a game over.
run() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Run method of the gameThread.
run() - Method in class view.GamePanel
